suppress.notes: jQuery bundled inside Maven Fluido site skin (build-time reporting only, not a runtime dependency). Triggered by SpotBugs maven plugin rendering reports with maven-fluido-skin.

CVE-2026-27727: RCE via JNDI Reference resolution in mchange-commons-java. Not exploitable in openmrs-core — c3p0 is used only as a JDBC connection pool and the vulnerable JNDI code path is not reachable. No untrusted JNDI References are processed through mchange-commons-java. The fixed version (0.4.0) is not yet published on Maven Central. Revisit when 0.4.0 is available and upgrade.

False positives: these CVEs are matched against the openmrs.war file via CPE cpe:2.3:a:openmrs:openmrs but refer to vulnerabilities in older OpenMRS releases or the OpenMRS Reference Application, not the current openmrs-core codebase.
False positive: CVE applies to OpenMRS 2.x Reference Application, not openmrs-core.
False positive: CVE applies to OpenMRS Reference Application, not openmrs-core.
False positive: CVE applies to older OpenMRS version, not the current openmrs-core.
False positive: CVE applies to OpenMRS Reference Application, not openmrs-core.
